Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Hi, how are you doing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I remembered a little more.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}The end won't be brought about by any one person in particular...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}It's going to happen because there are many who wish for it... Almost as if it was decided from the beginning.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}But isn't it strange, that there are those who would wish to bring about the end?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Well, I guess if you're unhappy, you'd want it to be over quickly, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Otherwise, you might end up consumed by hatred for everything in this world...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}What about the ones who just want their suffering to end, so they can be at peace?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}True, I guess that's not really something we need to worry about.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Plus, I'm not even sure what the "end" really means yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}There was one more thing I wanted to tell you today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Soon, the flowers of poison will bloom...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Three in the rival garden, and one in your own.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I don't know if this has anything to do with the end, but you should be careful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Really? From where I'm standing, it seems like you're surrounded by colorful flowers.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I just wanted you to know... I'm worried about you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I'll let you know if I find out anything else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Pharos gives me a carefree smile.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I sense a bond between Pharos and me...[n]{f 1 1}
